output:
Aggregated execute batches: completed 3/3.
Batch 1: Implemented batch 1 tasks T1, T2, T3, T6, and T7 in the repository, verified them with targeted frontend vitest runs plus ai-timeline-agent edge vitest via a temporary scoped config, and checkpointed results to `.megaplan/plans/cleanup-and-quality-pass-on-20260404-0138/execution_batch_1.json`.
Batch 2: Implemented batch 2 tasks T4 and T5, verified them with the full ai-timeline-agent edge test module, and checkpointed the batch results to `.megaplan/plans/cleanup-and-quality-pass-on-20260404-0138/execution_batch_2.json`.
Batch 3: Completed T8 verification and checkpointed the batch results to `.megaplan/plans/cleanup-and-quality-pass-on-20260404-0138/execution_batch_3.json`. Added `supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/**/*.test.ts` to the permanent edge vitest include list, verified the 10 named frontend test files pass, and ran both the official edge-config suite and the full repo vitest gate.
commands_run:
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts')
lines=p.read_text().splitlines()
start=end=None
for i,l in enumerate(lines,1):
    if 'const onTimelineDrop = useCallback(async' in l:
        start=i
        break
for i,l in enumerate(lines[start-1:],start):
    if '  }, [' in l:
        end=i
        break
print({'start':start,'end':end,'line_count':end-start+1})
PY

rg -n "export function cleanAssistantText|export async function executeToolCall|export function buildToolErrorTurn|async function processToolCalls|export async function runAgentLoop" supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/loop.ts
rg -n "type CommandParser|const COMMAND_ALIASES|const PARSERS|export function parseCommand" supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/command-parser.ts

task_updates.executor_notes: Updated the gallery item container to use `transition-[opacity,transform]` and removed the redundant selected-state `rounded-lg` class. Tightened `GallerySelectionContext` so identical replace/append/clear actions preserve map identity, which keeps `selectedGalleryIds` stable across no-op updates. Reviewed `GenerationsPaneGallery` and did not find a stale-closure issue in `handleImageClick`; its callback dependencies already track both the modifier state and selection action. Verified with the full related frontend test files.

Wrapped AgentChat output in `createPortal(..., document.body)` and added the repo-standard `typeof document === 'undefined'` guard before the portal call. This lifts the fixed-position bubble, overlay, and expanded panel out of pane transform context so the viewport anchoring is consistent for unlocked and locked pane states. Verified with the full AgentChat-related frontend test run and direct source checks.

Created `utils.ts` with the stricter shared helpers, removed duplicate local helper implementations from `tools/generation.ts` and `tools/create-task.ts`, and moved `llm/messages.ts` onto the shared `isRecord` while preserving its public API with `export { isRecord } from '../utils.ts'`. Verified the four downstream imports in `index.ts`, `db.ts`, `tool-calls.ts`, and `selectedClips.ts` still point at `./llm/messages.ts`, and ran the ai-timeline-agent edge tests successfully.

Refactored `useExternalDrop.ts` so `onTimelineDrop` is now a 25-line dispatcher, with module-level handlers for text-tool, effect-layer, file, multi-generation, single-generation, and asset drops. Consolidated track creation behind shared helpers, including `createTrackAtTop` for both audio and visual tracks, while preserving the original semantics: multi-generation drops still pass `trackId: undefined` when forcing new-track creation and asset drops still forward the resolved target track when reusing an existing track. Verified with the full related frontend test run plus direct dispatcher/handler checks.
commands_run:
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts')
lines=p.read_text().splitlines()
start=end=None
for i,l in enumerate(lines,1):
    if 'const onTimelineDrop = useCallback(async' in l:
        start=i
        break
for i,l in enumerate(lines[start-1:],start):
    if '  }, [' in l:
        end=i
        break
print({'start':start,'end':end,'line_count':end-start+1})
PY

task_updates.executor_notes: Replaced the inline modifier-key expression in `useLassoSelection` with `isMultiSelectEvent(event)` and extracted the AgentChatMessage truncation literals into `MAX_TOOL_NAME_LENGTH` and `MAX_ATTACHMENT_SUMMARY_LENGTH`. Verified the affected frontend files in the full related vitest run and with direct source checks.

Extracted `cleanAssistantText`, `executeToolCall`, and `buildToolErrorTurn` into module-level helpers and moved per-iteration tool processing behind `processToolCalls`, leaving `runAgentLoop` focused on initialization, loop control, LLM invocation, dispatch, and persistence. Added direct loop helper coverage and re-ran the full ai-timeline-agent edge test module successfully.
commands_run: rg -n "export function cleanAssistantText|export async function executeToolCall|export function buildToolErrorTurn|async function processToolCalls|export async function runAgentLoop" supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/loop.ts

task_updates.executor_notes: Replaced the sequential command `if` chain with explicit parser functions, a `COMMAND_ALIASES` normalization map, and a `PARSERS` dispatch table. Added parser tests for canonical commands, alias handling, and the unknown-command path, then re-ran the full ai-timeline-agent edge test module successfully.
commands_run: rg -n "type CommandParser|const COMMAND_ALIASES|const PARSERS|export function parseCommand" supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/command-parser.ts

task_updates.executor_notes: Added `supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/**/*.test.ts` to `config/testing/vitest.edge.config.ts`, then ran the required verification layers. The 10 named frontend test files passed cleanly: 10/10 files and 46/46 tests. In the official edge-config run, the `ai-timeline-agent` suites passed, but the overall edge run stayed red due to unrelated pre-existing failures in other edge-function areas. The final full `npx vitest run` gate also stayed red due to unrelated pre-existing failures outside the timeline-agent and gallery-selection changes; the refactored surfaces remained green in their targeted suites.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: `MediaGalleryItem` now uses `transition-[opacity,transform]` on the selected container, the selection ring classes remain, and no `transition-all` remains on that element. The related frontend test files passed.

`AgentChat` now portals its fixed-position UI to `document.body` and includes the `typeof document === 'undefined'` guard before calling `createPortal`, so its `bottom-5 right-5` positioning is viewport-relative instead of pane-relative.

`llm/messages.ts` now imports `isRecord` from `../utils.ts` and re-exports it. Verified `index.ts`, `db.ts`, `tool-calls.ts`, and `selectedClips.ts` still import from `./llm/messages.ts`, and ai-timeline-agent edge tests passed.

`onTimelineDrop` is now a 25-line dispatcher. `createTrackAtTop` handles both `audio` and `visual`, and the extracted handlers preserve the caller semantics around `trackId=undefined`, `forceNewTrack`, and `insertAtTop` forwarding.
The lasso hook now uses `isMultiSelectEvent(event)` instead of the inline modifier-key expression, and `AgentChatMessage` now uses named constants for the previous `80` and `120` truncation values.

`runAgentLoop` now delegates assistant-text cleanup to `cleanAssistantText`, tool dispatch to `executeToolCall`, tool-specific fatal formatting to `buildToolErrorTurn`, and tool-call iteration to `processToolCalls`, so the main function reads as orchestration over init, loop control, LLM invocation, dispatch, and persistence. The ai-timeline-agent edge test module passed.

`parseCommand` now tokenizes once, normalizes aliases through `COMMAND_ALIASES`, dispatches through `PARSERS`, and preserves the unknown-command error path. The parser test file covers canonical command families and aliases including `rm`, `issues`, `gen`, and `settext`.

The 10 named frontend test files passed. The `ai-timeline-agent` tests also passed under the official edge vitest config after adding the permanent include entry. The overall edge-config run and the full `npx vitest run` gate did not reach zero failures because of unrelated pre-existing suites elsewhere in the repository; the final full-suite summary was 26 failed and 804 passed test files, with 53 failed and 4128 passed tests.
